title: 5 Reasons Midlands Businesses Need Professional Janitorial Services

title: Medical Office Cleaning in Columbia SC: What OSHA Requires
excerpt: OSHA's bloodborne pathogen standard and EPA disinfectant requirements set the bar for medical office cleaning Columbia SC practices must meet — here's what the regulations actually require and how to document it.
